name: Waifu.it
description: Find a random or named waifu character and retrieve random anime facts through Waifu.it API V4.

auth.hint: Obtain a free Waifu.it token and send its raw value in the Authorization header.

tools.name: search_waifu
tools.description: Return a random waifu or search by character or anime name.

params.name: name
params.description: Character name; omit it for a random selection.

params.name: anime
params.description: Anime title used to select a matching character.
